name: sideshift-ai
description: Screen-analysis AI overlay. Highlight anything on screen, open focused side-chats. App-agnostic, uses your own Anthropic API key.

scripts.fable: dotnet fable src --outDir dist-fable --run vite build
scripts.fable:watch: dotnet fable watch src --outDir dist-fable --run vite
scripts.build: dotnet fable src --outDir dist-fable && vite build
